hooks.command: if [ -f "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.nrepl-port" ]; then echo 'Tip: For structural queries (namespace contents, resolver relationships), consider the REPL. For finding call sites or counting references for a refactor, use LSP find_references instead of Grep.'; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git commit'; then echo 'Reminder: update .claude/issue-stack.md and the active GitHub issue with progress.'; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'gh issue create'; then echo 'Reminder: Issue body = problem statement + repro case. Post solution ideas and implementation plans as comments after creation.'; fi

STACK="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/issue-stack.md"; if [ ! -f "$STACK" ]; then exit 0; fi; ISSUE=$(grep '^- #' "$STACK" | head -1 | grep -o '#[0-9]*' | tr -d '#'); if [ -z "$ISSUE" ]; then exit 0; fi; LABELS=$(gh issue view "$ISSUE" --json labels -q '.labels[].name' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$LABELS" | grep -q 'pdca:do'; then echo "Sub-agent task completed during Do phase (#$ISSUE). Check: are all plan checkboxes complete? If yes, transition to Check phase: gh issue edit $ISSUE --remove-label pdca:do --add-label pdca:check"; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '\(atom |\(volatile! |\(ref |\(agent |\(defonce '; then if ! echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qi 'APPROVED'; then echo 'WARNING: Mutable state introduced without approval comment. Per clojure-coding-standards, atom/volatile!/ref/agent require explicit user approval. Add a MUTATION APPROVED comment or ask the user.'; fi; fi
if [ -f "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/issue-stack.md" ]; then grep '^- ' "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/issue-stack.md" | head -5 | sed 's/- //g' | paste -sd ' → ' -; fi

STACK="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/issue-stack.md"; if [ ! -f "$STACK" ]; then exit 0; fi; ISSUE=$(grep '^- #' "$STACK" | head -1 | grep -o '#[0-9]*' | tr -d '#'); if [ -z "$ISSUE" ]; then exit 0; fi; LABELS=$(gh issue view "$ISSUE" --json labels -q '.labels[].name' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$LABELS" | grep -q 'pdca:do'; then echo "PDCA: issue #$ISSUE is in Do phase. Check if all plan checkboxes are complete. If yes, transition to Check: gh issue edit $ISSUE --remove-label pdca:do --add-label pdca:check"; elif echo "$LABELS" | grep -q 'pdca:check'; then echo "PDCA: issue #$ISSUE is in Check phase. Present the gap analysis to the user and transition to React."; elif echo "$LABELS" | grep -q 'pdca:react'; then echo "PDCA: issue #$ISSUE is in React phase. Ensure the user has responded to the gap analysis."; fi

hooks.prompt: If this subagent was working on a PDCA Do-phase task: review whether it encountered unexpected conditions and fundamentally changed its implementation approach from what was planned. Minor adaptations (different function name, slightly different data shape) are fine — approve. But if the subagent discovered something that invalidates the planned approach and worked around it (added fallback paths, switched strategies, skipped planned functionality instead of implementing it), block and explain what was found and why replanning may be needed. If this is not a PDCA Do-phase task, approve.

hooks.command: if [ -f "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/issue-stack.md" ] && grep -q '^- ' "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/issue-stack.md"; then echo '=== Current Issue Stack ==='; grep '^- ' "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/issue-stack.md" | head -5; echo ''; echo 'Read the top issue via GitHub MCP before proceeding.'; else echo 'No active issues. Stack is empty.'; fi
